name: ui-review-public
description: Marketplace for the ui-review plugin for Claude Code.

plugins.name: ui-review
plugins.description: Universal UI review plugin. Reviews any UI surface -- web, iOS, Android, web-based desktop (Electron/Tauri), design files, screenshots -- for visual quality, alignment, spacing, typography, color, responsive behavior, motion, accessibility, runtime performance, and anti-pattern detection. Seven specialist agents (visual reviewer, responsive reviewer, motion reviewer, accessibility reviewer, runtime reviewer, verifier, team lead), each running on the session model -- always the strongest available Claude -- backed by 10 self-contained reference files covering a universal review rubric, 153 catalogued anti-patterns (plus cross-references to the typescript-ui 108-tell and anti-slop catalogues), viewport matrices, motion heuristics, cross-platform accessibility, web/Apple/Material overlays, evidence pipelines, and design foundations. Two user-invoked skills: review-ui (standard 2-3 specialist pass) and review-ui-full (comprehensive 5-specialist + verifier team pass). Produces severity-tagged findings (CRITICAL/HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW/TASTE) with evidence citations, confidence classes, and concrete remediation. Read-only by default.
